title: Meenakshi Natarajan moves Supreme Court against Rajya Sabha nomination rejection
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Meenakshi Natarajan has moved the Supreme Court.
*   She is challenging the rejection of her nomination for the Rajya Sabha.
*   The legal action seeks to overturn the decision regarding her candidature.

title: SEBI proposes to limit salary disclosure of AMC top employees
content:
SEBI (Securities and Exchange Board of India) has put forth a new proposal.
*   This proposal aims to limit the public disclosure of salaries.
*   The disclosure limits specifically target top employees of Asset Management Companies (AMCs).

title: 22 more applicants approved under PLI scheme for textiles
content:
An additional 22 applicants have been approved to join the scheme.
*   These approvals fall under the Production Linked Incentive (PLI) scheme.
*   The scheme specifically targets and supports the textile manufacturing sector.

title: Watch: Iranian missiles strike near US Fifth Fleet HQ in Bahrain
content:
Iranian missiles have reportedly struck an area in Bahrain.
*   The strike occurred in close proximity to the US Fifth Fleet Headquarters.
*   The incident took place near a significant US military installation in the region.

title: Are PlaqueBoyMax and Huda dating? Love Island USA star fuels fresh rumours with streamer
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   Rumours are intensifying about a potential romantic relationship between streamer PlaqueBoyMax and Love Island USA star Huda.
*   Huda is specifically highlighted for fueling these fresh dating speculations.
*   The headline points to renewed interest in the relationship status of the popular streamer.

title: Supreme Court finds NewsClick founder Prabir Purkayastha’s arrest invalid, says he is entitled to be released from custody
content:
The Supreme Court has ruled on the arrest of NewsClick founder Prabir Purkayastha.
*   The court found his arrest to be invalid.
*   Consequently, Purkayastha is entitled to be released from custody.

title: Congress to move Supreme Court against rejection of Meenakshi Natarajan’s Rajya Sabha nomination
content:
The Congress party intends to approach the Supreme Court.
*   They are challenging the rejection of Meenakshi Natarajan's nomination.
*   Her nomination was for a seat in the Rajya Sabha.
